untranslatable_reason: ABW pattern requires detection of expanding highs and lows (wedge formation) over multiple bars, which cannot be expressed as single-bar indicator conditions. Year-to-date positioning context (bull/bear market regime, yearly high/low proximity) requires external market regime input beyond available indicators. Throwback/pullback behavior (50% occurrence within 9-13 days) is probabilistic and cannot be reliably encoded as deterministic entry conditions.
